Tuesday, June 9.description: “Film Nevada: Growing the State’s Creative Economy”, Kim Spurgeon, Director. As a division of the Governor’s Office of Economic Development, Film Nevada works to attract the film industry to the state, and serves as a free resource to connect production with the crew and services they need while filming. Learn more about what Film Nevada does and the current state of the industry in Southern Nevada.
Tuesday, June 9.summary: Lifelong Learning Club: Film Nevada: Growing the State’s Creative Economy

Wednesday, June 17.description: “Inside the Nevada Gaming Control Board”, Rebecca Garcia, Deputy Chief, NV Gaming Control Board and Jennifer Morton, Public Information Officer. The Nevada Gaming Control Board has been safeguarding the integrity of Nevada’s gaming industry for seven decades now. Learn how the Board operates, why it exists and the vital role it plays in protecting one of the state’s most iconic industries.
